# Replace decommissioning non-voter: s5 is decommissioning, MMA replaces
# with s6.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
  store-id=5 node-id=5 locality-tiers=zone=e
  store-id=6 node-id=6 locality-tiers=zone=f
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

update-store-status store-id=5 health=ok leases=shedding replicas=shedding
----
ok shedding=leases,replicas

repair-needed
----
ReplaceDecommissioningNonVoter: r1

repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] skipping s5 for replica transfer: replica disposition shedding (health ok)
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: AddReplica target store n6,s6 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER) to range 1 on store 6
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: AddReplica target store n6,s6 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n5,s5 (replica-id=5 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 5
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=2, range_id=1, change=r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n5,s5 (replica-id=5 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=1] result(success): ReplaceDecommissioningNonVoter repair for r1, removing non-voter on s5, adding non-voter on s6
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=6 node-id=6 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)
change-id=2 store-id=5 node-id=5 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=5 type=NON_VOTER)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Confirm the replacement: leaseholder reports s6 instead of s5.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=6 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

# After replacement enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
